title: Formula Evaluation: Incorrect Clinical Scoring
description: Risk that incorrectly defined formulas (visibility conditions, score calculations, urgency indicators) produce wrong outputs, potentially leading to incorrect clinical decisions or misdirected healthcare resources.

changeHistory.newValue: An incorrectly defined formula for urgency calculation or symptom scoring produces false-positive or false-negative results, leading to misdirected healthcare resources or delayed treatment for high-urgency patients.

hazardousSituation: An incorrectly defined formula for urgency calculation or symptom scoring produces false-positive or false-negative results, leading to misdirected healthcare resources or delayed treatment for high-urgency patients.
